name: continuity
description: [Alpha] Shared presence, file-activity awareness, decisions, task claims & handoffs for parallel Claude Code sessions. Works locally (SQLite, zero-config) or against a team server.

apiUrl.title: Team API URL (optional)
apiUrl.description: Base URL of a Continuity team server (the Cloudflare Worker). Leave blank to run locally against a SQLite file — no server needed.

apiKey.title: Team API key (optional)
apiKey.description: Your API key for the team server. Required only for team mode; leave blank for local mode.

repoAllowlist.title: Allowed git remotes (optional, comma-separated host/owner/repo)
repoAllowlist.description: Restrict Continuity to specific repos. Leave blank to activate in any git repo.

dbPath.title: Local database path (optional)
dbPath.description: Where the local SQLite file lives. Defaults to ~/.continuity/continuity.db. Ignored in team mode.

collisionGuard.title: Collision guard mode
collisionGuard.description: negotiate (default): contested edits are blocked until you message the other session and they respond, or the block times out. warn: single warning, retry proceeds. off: disabled. Legacy true/false map to negotiate/off.

messageTimeoutMinutes.title: Message / block timeout (minutes)
messageTimeoutMinutes.description: How long messages and enforcement blocks live before expiring (the no-deadlock rule). Default 10.
